title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-1087
summary: 1 This case involves an interpretation of § 23(a)(1)(A) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1939, as amended 26 U.S.C.A. § 23(a)(1)(A), providing for the deduction from gross income, in computing net income, of all the 'ordinary and necessary expenses paid or incurred * * * in carrying on any trade o...
